included_primary_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; primary records only
escalation_queue_ids: string work item id; overdue primary ids in triage priority order
overdue_open_primary_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; overdue primary records still open at the as-of date
overdue_recently_closed_primary_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; overdue primary records closed inside the recent closed window
sla_breach_rate: number rounded to exactly 3 decimal places; overdue primary count divided by included primary count

duplicate_clusters.primary_id: string canonical work item id; clusters sorted by primary_id
duplicate_ids: string duplicate work item id; sorted lexicographically

missing_owner_ids: string work item id; sorted lexicographically; included primary records with no owner
oldest_unowned_primary_id: string work item id; included primary record with no owner and the largest age from created_at to closed_at for recently closed records, otherwise to as_of

top_hotspot.team: team name for the owner/team pair with the highest overdue primary count
top_hotspot.owner: owner name, or UNASSIGNED when owner is missing
top_hotspot.overdue_count: integer count of overdue primary records for this owner/team pair
